interpretation: P(benign) shifted from 75.9% (cicids2017) to 94.4% (cicids2018) (|delta|=0.185, LARGE). This prior shift acts independently of feature-distribution shift and is a likely contributor to cross-year precision degradation.
note: Prior shift is NOT captured by the covariate or covariate-shape axes. It requires a prior-corrected evaluation (natural priors, uncapped test set).
